$comment: Manifest used ONLY by the windows-midi2-gate CI lane to provision the
projection so Pulp's opt-in WinRT MIDI 2.0 backend
PULP_HAS_WINRT_MIDI) can be compile-verified. This is NOT a Pulp
runtime dependency and is never part of the default build.
The midi2 port pulls cppwinrt (host) which generates the projection
name: pulp-winrt-midi2-gate
